  • [ - ] Zoltan - member since 15-Feb-20

    Brazil has many deficiencies: too much individualism up front (Neymar), too little creativity in the middle (Paqueta), and last, but not least, the Brazilian coach is a huge liability with its defensive mindset (perhaps because his team main asset is the defence? :) ) I believe that Serbia could win this game, but I don't like their lineup which is also too defensive and it has the wrong structure: Mitrovic and Vlahovic should play up front, Tadic and Kostic on the flanks to provide assists, and M. Savic in the middle as a creative midfielder who can also score. This idiot Serbian coach gives too much respect to Brazil: Kostic and Vlahovic are on the bench and M. Savic is in the wrong position.
